report: L5 — NIAH Heatmap: KiaOmni Needle-in-Haystack Visual Confirmation
critical_disclosure: SnapKV = faithful arXiv:2404.14469. BlockSal = our novel block-level baseline.

entries.claim: KiaOmni_s8 achieves 100% needle recall across all depths at all budgets B>=98
entries.verification: Filter rows where policy=KiaOmni_sigma8, accuracy column is 1.0 for every depth/budget/ctx combination

entries.claim: KiaOmni_Gaussian achieves 100% needle recall across all depths at all budgets B>=98
entries.verification: Filter rows where policy=KiaOmni_Gaussian, accuracy column is 1.0 for every depth/budget/ctx combination

entries.claim: BlockSal achieves 100% needle recall across all depths at all budgets B>=98
entries.verification: Filter rows where policy=SnapKV_Modified, accuracy column is 1.0 for every depth/budget/ctx combination

entries.claim: SnapKV achieves 0% needle recall at B=98 and B=128
entries.verification: Filter rows where policy=RealSnapKV and budget in (98,128), accuracy is 0.0 for every depth/ctx combination

entries.claim: SnapKV achieves partial recall at B=512 (mean ~0.66 across depths)
entries.verification: Filter rows where policy=RealSnapKV and budget=512, compute mean accuracy across all depths and ctx lengths

entries.claim: H2O achieves near 0% recall at B=98 and B=128
entries.verification: Filter rows where policy=H2O and budget in (98,128), mean accuracy < 0.15 across all depths/ctx

entries.claim: H2O achieves strong recall at B=512 (mean ~0.86 across depths)
entries.verification: Filter rows where policy=H2O and budget=512, mean accuracy ~0.86

files_published.reports/benchmarks/niah-heatmap/data/cur: Whitelist-filtered accuracy data with renamed policy columns
Whitelist-filtered accuracy data in JSON format
files_published.reports/benchmarks/niah-heatmap/plots/: 24 whitelist policy heatmap PNGs (6 policies x 4 budgets), renamed per publication convention

excluded.reason: Excluded from whitelist per §4b (PPL anomaly). PNGs exist in source archive at main-results/benchmarks/niah-heatmap/plots/.
